Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ernestine May-McNary telephone number 415-822-7466 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Rebecca Liu of Office of The City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3870 for Defendant.

The Parties presented oral argument. Upon conclusion of argument, PETITIONER EARNESTINE MAY-MCNARY'S Motion For Hearing On Writ Administrative Mandamus was taken under submission.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
